volunteers.name: Aarav Sharma
volunteers.credentialsInfo: Paramedic (EMT-B certified), 5 years active ambulance and emergency duty in Vizag.

volunteers.name: Priya Patel
volunteers.credentialsInfo: Red Cross Disaster Relief Volunteer, Certified CPR instructor in Visakhapatnam.

volunteers.name: Rajesh Kumar
volunteers.credentialsInfo: Former security supervisor, seeking community integration and safety patrols.

volunteers.name: Aditi Rao
volunteers.credentialsInfo: Mental health crisis counselor, active social worker in Visakhapatnam.

broadcasts.message: SIGHTING WARNING: Suspicious activity spotted near RK Beach Road alleyway. Lone walkers please take well-lit routes.

helpRequests.description: Subject collapsed near Dwaraka Nagar RTC Complex Gate 4. Unresponsive but breathing. First-aid assistance requested.
Intimidation incident. Followed by a suspicious group of individuals. Seeking companion escort to nearest Safe Zone.
Two-wheeler collision in the intersection. Minor injuries, but traffic is blocked and dangerous. Need safety volunteers to coordinate.
helpRequests.locationName: Intersection of MVP Double Road & Highway

witnessLogs.testimony: I was walking to Dwaraka Nagar RTC Complex when the individual collapsed. Aarav Sharma arrived in under 4 minutes with a medical kit and immediately stabilized the situation. Excellent response.
A delivery driver turned sharply and collided with another bike. The rider is holding their ankle. Glad Vanguard safety alerts are up so volunteers can help direct traffic.
